Interface UserRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<User,UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<User,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<User,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<User,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<User,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<User>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<User,UUID>
@Repository public interface UserRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<User,UUID>

  • Method Details

    • countUsers

      @Query("SELECT COUNT(u) FROM User u WHERE u.isDeleted = false") long countUsers()

    • findByEmail

      @Query("FROM User WHERE email = :email AND isDeleted = false") User findByEmail(@Param("email") String email)

    • findByUsername

      @Query("FROM User WHERE username = :username AND isDeleted = false") User findByUsername(@Param("username") String username)

    • findAllUser

      @Query("FROM User WHERE isDeleted = false") List<User> findAllUser()

    • findUserById

      @Query("FROM User WHERE id = :id AND isDeleted = false") User findUserById(@Param("id") UUID id)

    • existsByEmail

      boolean existsByEmail(String email)

    • existsByPhone

      boolean existsByPhone(String phone)

    • findAllByIdInAndIsDeletedFalse

      List<User> findAllByIdInAndIsDeletedFalse(List<UUID> ids)

    • findAllByUsernameInAndIsDeletedFalse

      List<User> findAllByUsernameInAndIsDeletedFalse(List<String> usernames)

    • searchByUsername

      @Query(" SELECT u\n FROM User u\n WHERE lower(u.username) LIKE lower(concat(:username, '%'))\n AND u.isDeleted = false\n AND u.roleId = '3'\n AND (\n :currentUserId IS NULL\n OR (\n u.id != :currentUserId\n AND NOT EXISTS (\n SELECT 1 FROM Contact c\n WHERE c.status = 3\n AND (\n (c.user.id = :currentUserId AND c.contactUser.id = u.id)\n OR\n (c.user.id = u.id AND c.contactUser.id = :currentUserId)\n )\n )\n )\n )\n") org.springframework.data.domain.Page<User> searchByUsername(@Param("username") String username, @Param("currentUserId") UUID currentUserId, org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)

    • existsByUsername

      boolean existsByUsername(String username)
